findings.description: Deleted legacy Chat.jsx (85 lines, broken sendChat import) and removed orphaned getChat() from client.js
Extracted timeAgo/prettyName/timeUntil/formatTimestamp/stripChatDecorations to src/lib/formatters.js; removed 8 duplicate implementations
Fixed audio.play() unhandled Promise (mobile autoplay block), index-based list keys in FeedDetailPanel, and extracted 5 magic number constants in FeedItem
Cleared all 7 ESLint warnings; added no-console rule; fixed className→class bug in sanitize.js; added loadPackages to missing SettingsModal deps
Installed Vitest; 37 tests covering formatters.js, connection.js, sanitize.js; configured vite.config.js test block

remaining.authUrl: Defined in FeedItem.jsx and FeedDetailPanel.jsx — minor duplication, low priority
